footnotes: Praise ye the LORD. Praise: Heb. Hallelujah

segments.text: Praise the LORD from the heavens; praise him in the heights!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him, all his angels; praise him, all his hosts!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him, sun and moon, praise him, all you shining stars!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise him, you highest heavens, and you waters above the heavens!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them praise the name of the LORD! For he commanded and they were created.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise the LORD from the earth, you great sea creatures and all deeps, fire and hail, snow and mist, stormy wind fulfilling his word!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Mountains and all hills, fruit trees and all cedars! Beasts and all livestock, creeping things and flying birds!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all rulers of the earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Young men and maidens together, old men and children! Let them praise the name of the LORD, for his name alone is exalted; his majesty is above earth and heaven.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He has raised up a horn for his people, praise for all his saints, for the people of Israel who are near to him.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise the name of the LORD, for his name alone is exalted; his majesty is above earth and heaven.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He has raised up a horn for his people, praise for all his saints, for the people of Israel who are near to him. Praise the LORD!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
